title: The Reason for [the Dismissal of 'Ammar
description: I have already mentioned part of the reason for his dismissal, and (now] I shall report on the remainder. According to al-SariShu'ayb-Sayf-those of his shaykhs I have already mentioned:22e The people of al-Kufah, this 'Utarid, and others with him wrote to 'Umar about 'Ammar, "He is no commander and cannot cope with the situation in which he finds himself." The Kufans put pressure on him, so 'Umar wrote to Ammar, [telling him to] present himself. He set out with a delegation of Kufans, taking with him [only] those whom he considered to be his supporters.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 14
